enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Muzhumathi?

The song Muzhumathi expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, reflecting the emotions of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Kanimozhi related to this song?

In Kanimozhi, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Muzhumathi?

The song is sung by Bella Shinde and Vijay Yesudas, whose voices complement each other beautifully.

Who composed the music for Muzhumathi?

The music for Muzhumathi was composed by Satish Chakravarthy, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Muzhumathi released?

Muzhumathi was released on July 22, 2010, as part of the Kanimozhi soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Muzhumathi, the song beautifully encapsulates the tender emotions of love and longing. Set against the backdrop of Kanimozhi, it highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This duet is a perfect blend of enchanting voices and captivating music, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muzhumathi from Kanimozhi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Bella Shinde and Vijay Yesudas, this song takes you on a romantic journey filled with soothing melodies. The collaboration of talented lyricist Na Muthukumar and music director Satish Chakravarthy adds a unique charm that resonates with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: Listen to the full moon, everything is true; who can say that the one who fell in love is not real?
How many loves have been seen? How many dreams have been asked? No one is like me, listen to this.
What is understood by the moon is understood by the soul.
The dreams have taken flight, memories are soaring like the moon.
Poetic love has a thousand stories; it is said that life flows with memories, that is what my love says.
In this world, I have come searching for the best place, I have come to your heart.
In your embrace, my solitude has been given its own space.
The love of the river has come to the shore, it has spoken of waves.
Again and again, the waves are calling; all those actions are being heard.
In the river, looking at the moonlight, does it not think of brightness?
In the morning, our love is not to be separated from the sky.
What is understood by the moon is understood by the soul.
The dreams have taken flight, memories are soaring like the moon.
The full moon has said everything; everything is true, there is no one like you.
